profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Merry Riana Edukasi Tbk operates educational institution and self-development centre for Kids and Teens in Indonesia. The company offers training programs, such as Merry Riana Learning Center, Merry Riana Events, Merry Riana Digital Learning, and seminar/workshop training programs. It also provides regular, event-based, and online training programs, as well as offers educational services. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Merry Riana Edukasi Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Merry Riana Indonesia.
